reason: Global TianChen-RV architecture invariants, RVV-first stage order, and descriptor/source-front-door red lines for this macro campaign.
RVV plugin-local selected-body realization, low-precision resource planning, packed-i4 no-win policy facts, provider-owned route authority, and fail-closed mirror rules.

summary: Implemented provider-owned packed-i4 remediation plan facts for the selected low-precision product-reduction-dequant candidate. Added remediation_plan_contract, remediation_plan, remediation_statement_strategy, and remediation_vector_budget to the resource candidate/selection surface; Gearbox materializes them, selected-body realization copies them through the existing low-precision attr whitelist, provider planning parses and verifies them, statement planning requires them before packed-i4 load/unpack/product/pair-sum/reduce construction, route metadata mirrors them, and target validation/support-bundle export consume them as mirrors only.
non_goals_observed: No q4/q8/llama route authority, no source-front-door positive route, no Common EmitC semantic branch, no runtime/performance win claim.
